items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Business Intelligence Analyst to transform data into actionable insights that help our leadership team make better decisions. You will build dashboards, create reports, and conduct deep-dive analyses that surface the stories hidden in our data.

Sitting at the intersection of data engineering and business strategy, you will work with stakeholders across sales, marketing, product, and finance to understand their questions and deliver answers in a clear, compelling format.

Responsibilities

  • Design and build interactive dashboards and reports in Looker, Tableau, or similar tools
  • Write complex SQL queries to extract, transform, and analyze data from multiple sources
  • Conduct ad-hoc analyses to support strategic decisions across departments
  • Define and standardize key metrics and KPIs in collaboration with business stakeholders
  • Identify data quality issues and work with data engineering to resolve them
  • Present findings and recommendations to leadership in a clear, non-technical manner

Requirements

  • 3+ years of BI or analytics experience
  • Advanced SQL skills and experience with modern data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift)
  • Proficiency with BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI, or Metabase)
  • Strong analytical thinking and ability to translate business questions into data analyses
  • Excellent communication and data visualization skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience with dbt or other data transformation tools
  • Python or R skills for statistical analysis
  • Experience with SaaS business metrics (ARR, NRR, churn, cohort analysis)
